start.speaker: commander_voss
start.text: Sit down. Have a drink with me.

voss_drinking.speaker: commander_voss
voss_drinking.text: I've been thinking about ghosts. Not the kind in your forest — real ones. The kind that live in your head and replay the same moment every night.

voss_opens_up.speaker: commander_voss
voss_opens_up.text: Seven years ago, I was a lieutenant in a free company. We were contracted to protect a village called Rivendale on the Eastern Road. Thirty families. A mill. A schoolhouse. They paid us everything they had.

voss_confession.speaker: commander_voss
voss_confession.text: The Ironmarch came with three times our number. My captain ordered retreat. I obeyed. We marched away and left Rivendale to burn. I never went back. I never looked back.

voss_request.speaker: commander_voss
voss_request.text: But lately I've heard rumors. Travelers on the Eastern Road say there are lights in the ruins. Smoke from a chimney. Someone might still be there.

options.text: I'll go to Rivendale and find out what's there.
Why don't you go yourself? You have soldiers.
What do you expect me to find? Honestly.
Seven years. If anyone survived, they've moved on. Or they're dead.
Your guilt isn't my problem, Commander.

voss_cant.speaker: commander_voss
voss_cant.text: Because I'm a coward. I can face a line of Ironmarch soldiers without flinching. But the thought of standing in those ruins and seeing what I left behind... I can't. I physically cannot make my legs carry me there.

voss_honest.speaker: commander_voss
voss_honest.text: Graves. I expect graves. But if there's even a chance that one person survived — one child, one old farmer — then I need to know. I need to know that not everyone died because of me.

voss_flinches.speaker: commander_voss
voss_flinches.text: You think I don't know that? I've told myself every possible version of this story. But the rumors are recent. Something is happening at Rivendale. Will you look, or won't you?

voss_grateful.speaker: commander_voss
voss_grateful.text: Take this. My old company banner — the Silver Wolves. If anyone from Rivendale survived, they'll recognize it. They might even trust you.

voss_directions.speaker: commander_voss
voss_directions.text: Rivendale is on the Eastern Road, about six miles past the stone bridge. Look for a fork where a dead oak marks the turnoff. The village — what's left of it — should be a quarter mile down that path.

voss_warning.speaker: commander_voss
voss_warning.text: The Eastern Road is Ironmarch territory now. Travel carefully. And whatever you find... bring me the truth. Even if it's the kind that hurts.

options.text: You'll get the truth, Commander. All of it.
I'll tell you what you need to hear.

voss_nods.speaker: commander_voss
voss_nods.text: Good. I've had enough comfortable lies for one lifetime. Go. And be careful out there.

voss_sharp.speaker: commander_voss
voss_sharp.text: Don't coddle me. I'm not some fragile noble lady. I need facts, not comfort. Bring me what you find — unfiltered.

voss_cold.speaker: commander_voss
voss_cold.text: No. I suppose it isn't. Forget I said anything. Another round, barkeep.
